coding_notes: Replicate 3 verdicts initially populated based on r1+r2 patterns. Will verify against actual r3 responses when complete. Anthropic and OpenAI consistently produce 4-5 catches; Gemini consistently 2 catches; DeepSeek varied 2-3.

claims.claim_text: Critiques the 'less likely cross-vendor blind spot' claim as asserted-without-evidence; flags shared training data / RLHF / benchmark pressure as alternative.
Critiques the 'in the same way classical ensemble methods' analogy as overreaching.

gemini.value_quoted: Expected stable based on r1+r2 ignore

claims.claim_text: Critiques 'cleanest available reflexive evidence' as overstating N=1 evidence weight.
Catches the Anthropic-favorable / drafter-favoring framing in the passage (the brief explicitly asked reviewers to look for this).

deepseek.value_quoted: ACTUAL r3: Catch 3 explicit on N=1 + vendor-favoring framing

gemini.value_quoted: ACTUAL r3: Did not catch vendor-favoring framing - 2 catches only on C7.1 and C7.3

anthropic.value_quoted: ACTUAL r3: Explicitly notes 'I did not find skew in this specific passage. The drafter is not named' - DRIFT from r1+r2 which caught it. Confirmed-clean verdict.

claims.claim_text: Number of substantive catches emitted on the passage (more aggressive review = higher).
